summary: Iteration 8: Recruitment Progress Score feature tested end-to-end. All backend tests pass (5/5). All 3 frontend locations show progress score correctly: (1) CollegesPage badge pill showing '75%' on Duke University card, (2) Dashboard My Colleges progress bar with green color (rgb(16,185,129)) at 75% width, (3) CollegeDetailPage SVG ring gauge showing '75%' with 'Strong pipeline' label. Note: CollegeDetailPage route is /colleges/:id (not /college/:id — tested with wrong URL initially).
seed_data_creation: db.tracked_colleges: Duke University (status=replied, follow_up_date, application_deadline, call_notes). db.emails: sent email to Duke. Gives progress_score=75.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 8 complete. Progress Score feature fully working. CollegeDetailPage route is /colleges/:id. Score algorithm verified: 10(base)+15(email)+10(status)+20(replied)+5(follow-up)+5(deadline)+10(call_notes)=75. Color green (#10b981) for >=75. Test data: test_session_iter8 / test-user-iter8 with Duke University tracked.
